title: Nimbus commando

{{Quote|He's surrounded by a group of trained commandos called the Nimbus.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Orliss Gillmunn]], speaking of [[Alto Stratus]]|<ref name="Republic 55">[[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]]</ref>}}
The '''Nimbus commandos''' were the [[Special forces/Legends|elite guards]] of the [[Jabiimi Nationalists|Jabiimi]] [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] leader [[Alto Stratus]].

They were recruited to be the Separatist equivalent of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] units that were wreaking havoc on the Separatists.

==Description==
===Structure===
A dozen handpicked members served as personal bodyguards for the [[Commander-in-Chief/Legends|Commander-in-Chief]], with the remainder split into [[Troop/Legends|troops]] with specializations including infiltration, breaching, [[Sniper/Legends|sniping]], explosives disposal, high-speed reconnaissance, and [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]].<ref name="GaW" />

*'''Nimbus commandos'''—led by a [[Commander-in-Chief/Legends|Commander-in-Chief]].<ref name="GaW" />
*'''Nimbus team'''—Two [[Troop/Legends|troops]] and extra troopers (ranged from 96 to 100 and more troopers).<ref name="GaW" />
*'''Troop'''—Two [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]] (48 troopers).<ref name="GaW" />
*'''Platoon'''—Two [[Squad/Legends|squads]] (24 troopers) led by a [[Nimbus Lieutenant]].<ref name="GaW" />
*'''Squad'''—Three [[Fire team/Legends|fire teams]] (12 troopers) led by a [[Master Trooper]].<ref name="GaW" />
*'''Fire team'''— Four troopers led by a [[Task Unit Commander]].<ref name="GaW" />

===Ranks===
Only enlisted [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] in the [[Nationalist Army|Jabiim armed forces]] could apply for the [[Nimbus program]], although highly skilled [[Jabiimi Loyalists|Loyalist]] defectors were sometimes accepted into the ranks. The indoctrination was grueling, but successful initiates were welcomed as senior enlisted and received the rank of [[Nimbus Trooper]]. They were then assigned to one of the two [[Troop/Legends|troops]] that made up a Nimbus team. Advancement through the ranks could be rapid and chaotic; the battles on Jabiim often saw scores of members of the Nimbus commandos die in a single engagement.<ref name="GaW" />

*'''[[Nimbus Colonel]]'''<ref name="GaW" />
*'''[[Nimbus Lieutenant]]'''<ref name="GaW" />
*'''[[Master Trooper]]'''<ref name="GaW" />
*'''[[Task Unit Commander]]'''<ref name="GaW" />
*'''[[Nimbus Trooper]]'''<ref name="GaW" />

==History==
===Origins===
The origins of the Nimbus commandos dated back three thousand years to Jabiim's colonization. The [[Jabiimi]] settlers formed a ground army and a small stellar navy in response to [[Trandoshan invasion|incursions]] by [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] raiders attempting to steal Jabiimi ore stockpiles. Elite divisions within the Jabiimi Army were created to handle the most difficult tasks, and these [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]]—consisting of units such as the [[Black Gauntlets]], the [[D.E.E.P.]], and the [[Stone Torrent]]—eventually become a third military branch. Jabiimi special forces proved instrumental in driving off the Lythian pirates and other threats.<ref name="GaW" />

===Formation===
Prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Alto Stratus]] served as a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Bronze Nimbus]], one of several [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] units in the [[Jabiimi Military]] assembled during the Trandoshan invasion. When he became disillusioned with the cowardice of the Jabiim Army, he brought Bronze Nimbus into his personal command, drawing elements of the Jabiim Army into his cult of personality. By the time the Clone Wars broke out, now the leader of the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]], Alto Stratus, had consolidated the special forces as the Nimbus commandos.<ref name="GaW" />

===Clone Wars===
{{Quote|Commander Stratus. One of our patrols has spotted a Republic convoy moving towards Cobalt Station. I'd like a permission to attack.|Colonel Mazzi|<ref name="Republic 56">[[Republic 56|''Republic'' 56]]</ref>}}
Prior to the [[Battle of Jabiim]], Stratus took over the ruling [[Jabiim Congress]] in a [[Political coup on Jabiim|coup]]. Key members of the Congress were [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] by the Nimbus commandos,<ref name="GaW" /> including most of the Loyalist members.<ref name="Republic 55" /> They also carried out shadow missions, including kidnapping and data theft, to give Stratus the leverage he needed to blackmail the other councilors into following his orders. Stratus then used his influence to ally Jabiim with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In order to maintain public order during this time, Stratus had consolidated the regular military, now known as the [[Nationalist Army]]. He also had the Nimbus commandos destroy armories and soften up the [[Jabiimi Loyalists]] so that the Nationalist Army could engage the Loyalists in battle on an equal footing.<ref name="GaW" />

While the Republic forces regrouped at their camp, Alto Stratus gave a powerful speech to rally his Nimbus soldiers that delivered vehemently anti-Republican rhetoric. He cited the past record of Republic apathy during the events such as [[Brainrot Plague]], Trandoshan invasion, and [[Lythian pirate raids]]. As the Jedi watched Stratus's speech through the hologram, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Orliss Gillmunn]] explained the situation to the newly-arrived Master [[Sirrus]], including the Nimbus commandos.<ref name="Republic 55">[[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]]</ref>

During the Battle of Jabiim, these elite soldiers saw action against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] forces. The Nimbus commandos managed to launch a surprise attack on [[Shelter Base]], destroying an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]].<ref name="Republic 55" /> At one point, a [[HoloNet News Core Edition]] report on the attack that was transmitted from the Shelter Base managed to confirm that Alto Stratus had an undisclosed number of Nimbus soldiers with him.<ref name="HNN 14:9:01">{{InsiderCite|69|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:9:01}}</ref>

On the twenty-eighth day, they crushed [[General/Legends|General]] [[Norcuna]]'s forces in the northern hemisphere, and, by the thirty-fourth day, ambushed a Republic convoy headed for [[Cobalt Station]],<ref name="Republic 56" /> and later defeated the Republic forces at Cobalt Station.<ref name="Republic 57">[[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]]</ref>

===Legacy===
{{Quote|All of the assassin droids are destroyed, and we're the last of the Nimbus. But we will win the battle…|A Nimbus commando, before his death|<ref name="Republic 57" />}}
Following the Battle of Jabiim, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Mazzi]] took command of the Nimbus commandos and the [[Nationalist Army]]. He allied the unit with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], aiding Imperial efforts to crush the remaining [[Jabiimi Loyalists]].<ref name="GaW" />

The Nimbus commandos were still active after the establishment of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], with a few going off Jabiim to seek fortune as [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] on planets with a similar environment. One such planet was [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], where the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|clan]] [[Gejalli]] was rumored to keep more than a dozen members of the Nimbus commandos on retainer.<ref name="GaW" />

==Weapons and equipment==
Their signature piece of gear, the [[repulsorlift skate]], allowed its members to skim three [[meter]]s above land or water at speeds of up to ninety-five [[kilometer]]s per hour. Using skates, commandos in squads of three could penetrate enemy lines and reach heavy equipment, which they destroyed with timed charges or [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]]. The Nimbus commandos often employed minefields, since the skates' repulsor field allowed a wearer to glide over a live mine without triggering it.<ref name="GaW" />

A Nimbus unit carried a great deal of equipment into the field crammed into belts and backpacks. This gear included explosive charges, ammunition, nonperishable rations, waterproofing spray, thermal warming units, and low-altitude communications boosters. The commandos were expert survivalists and skilled with edged weapons including swords, daggers, and machetes.<ref name="GaW" />

During the Clone Wars, the Nimbus commandos adopted the [[Separatist commando blaster rifle]], a weapon capable of both long-range sniping and semiautomatic rapid fire as well as of launching concussive sonic blasts. Another Clone Wars introduction, the [[A-series assassin droid]], worked alongside members of the Nimbus commandos and used blasters, flechette launchers, and cutting blades to damage organics. Many A-Series units continued to serve the Nimbus commandos throughout the New Republic era and beyond.<ref name="GaW" />
